text.message: My first game of the season I played against the #1 player in the world lol
Do you know how matchmaking works?
wow, thats unlucky, I think its random
I have played top players also and players in gold alsweel in same match
Probably is, I feel like every game it flings me from the lowest brisket to the highest haha
Thought blue got robbed already? My bad
its been my, but all good
so what are you talking about?
Just about matchmaking in the game
Some games I play against the top players and other games it's unranked people
Didn't see that red bought a dev rip
Thought you'd still have a sheep lol
Haven't even had the chance to 4:1 yet
complaining about being the only one robbed
i didnt know if middle gonna be open even
i wouldn't have done that trade if i knew he was going to do that
why are you blocking us with no cards?
Cause I don't know where else to block
I should probably done green actually
and green is in a great position
blue didn't ruin anything, you can still get road by going around
yeah the bot gonna block the around
you have every resource and a strong port
once you get brick port, the 10 is sheep for you
black gonna get sheep port tho
Well sheep hasn't rolled once lol
Not one sheep in this game
Almost had a city and then had to 7 out
Green can you wait a nit
Like nobody else is even close
Literally there hasn't even been a way for me to win
ahh blue is doing just fine lol
you can't complain and where to block
sometimes luck is on my side
the 9 block when you didn't even get a card was the start of our downfall
Well how was I supposed to know green was gonna get every single road after that
